description: Known consignees (I.5) and logistics agents (I.6) for UK dairy exports. Consignees are the receiving party on the EHC. Logistics agents in I.6 are common on 8322 certificates and are not errors.

consignees_i5.name: Navobi
consignees_i5.notes: Multiple receiving sites across Barneveld area.

consignees_i5.name: Arla Foods Ingredients P/S
consignees_i5.address: c/o Taw Valley Creamery, South Weeke, North Tawton, Devon EX20 2DA (I.1 consignor); Soenderhoej 1-12, DK-8260 Viby-J, Denmark (I.5 consignee for internal transfers & AFI powder EHCs)
consignees_i5.notes: I.5 consignee is ALWAYS Arla Foods Ingredients Group P/S Viby-J for AFI powder EHCs regardless of end customer. This is standard and correct.

consignees_i5.name: J M W Farms Ltd
consignees_i5.notes: Cat 3 receiving establishment GB NI/4111. I.25 = Further process.
